'''yochasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:veally|veally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ch-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:veally|veally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yochasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yochasithi|yochasithi]] || [[word:yochasiji|yochasiji]] || [[word:yochasishi|yochasishi]] || [[word:yochasiki|yochasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yochasuthuthu|yochasuthuthu]] || [[word:yochasujuju|yochasujuju]] || [[word:yochasushushu|yochasushushu]] || [[word:yochasukuku|yochasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yochasuthu|yochasuthu]] || [[word:yochasuju|yochasuju]] || [[word:yochasushu|yochasushu]] || [[word:yochasuku|yochasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yochasufthuf|yochasufthuf]] || [[word:yochasufjuf|yochasufjuf]] || [[word:yochasufshuf|yochasufshuf]] || [[word:yochasufkuf|yochasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yochasethe|yochasethe]] || [[word:yochaseje|yochaseje]] || [[word:yochaseshe|yochaseshe]] || [[word:yochaseke|yochaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yochasothotho|yochasothotho]] || [[word:yochasojojo|yochasojojo]] || [[word:yochasoshosho|yochasoshosho]] || [[word:yochasokoko|yochasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yochasotho|yochasotho]] || [[word:yochasojo|yochasojo]] || [[word:yochasosho|yochasosho]] || [[word:yochasoko|yochasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yochasofthof|yochasofthof]] || [[word:yochasofjof|yochasofjof]] || [[word:yochasofshof|yochasofshof]] || [[word:yochasofkof|yochasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yochasïfthïf|yochasïfthïf]] || [[word:yochasïfjïf|yochasïfjïf]] || [[word:yochasïfshïf|yochasïfshïf]] || [[word:yochasïfkïf|yochasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yochasïfthïfthïf|yochasïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:yochasïfjïfjïf|yochasïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:yochasïfshïfshïf|yochasïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:yochasïfkïfkïf|yochasïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yochasïfthïf|yochasïfthïf]] || [[word:yochasïfjïf|yochasïfjïf]] || [[word:yochasïfshïf|yochasïfshïf]] || [[word:yochasïfkïf|yochasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yochasïfthïf|yochasïfthïf]] || [[word:yochasïfjïf|yochasïfjïf]] || [[word:yochasïfshïf|yochasïfshïf]] || [[word:yochasïfkïf|yochasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yochasæthæ|yochasæthæ]] || [[word:yochasæjæ|yochasæjæ]] || [[word:yochasæshæ|yochasæshæ]] || [[word:yochasækæ|yochasækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yochasathatha|yochasathatha]] || [[word:yochasajaja|yochasajaja]] || [[word:yochasashasha|yochasashasha]] || [[word:yochasakaka|yochasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yochasatha|yochasatha]] || [[word:yochasaja|yochasaja]] || [[word:yochasasha|yochasasha]] || [[word:yochasaka|yochasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yochasafthaf|yochasafthaf]] || [[word:yochasafjaf|yochasafjaf]] || [[word:yochasafshaf|yochasafshaf]] || [[word:yochasafkaf|yochasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yochasasha|yochasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yochashësha|yochashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yochasrosha|yochasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yochasmusha|yochasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yochasyasha|yochasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyochasnkshësha|goyochasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyochasnkrosha|goyochasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyochasnkmusha|goyochasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyochasnkyasha|goyochasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yochachasasha|yochachasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yochachashësha|yochachashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yochachasrosha|yochachasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yochachasmusha|yochachasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yochachasyasha|yochachasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyochachasnkshësha|goyochachasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyochachasnkrosha|goyochachasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyochachasnkmusha|goyochachasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyochachasnkyasha|goyochachasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yechæsasha|yechæsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yechæshësha|yechæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yechæsrosha|yechæsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yechæsmusha|yechæsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yechæsyasha|yechæsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyechæsnkshësha|goyechæsnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyechæsnkrosha|goyechæsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyechæsnkmusha|goyechæsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyechæsnkyasha|goyechæsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yochfasasha|yochfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yochfashësha|yochfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yochfasrosha|yochfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yochfasmusha|yochfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yochfasyasha|yochfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyochfasnkshësha|goyochfasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyochfasnkrosha|goyochfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyochfasnkmusha|goyochfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyochfasnkyasha|goyochfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
